title: Azure SRE Agent — Command Stream Exposure
desc: CVSS 8.6 vulnerability in the Azure SRE Agent reveals live command execution streams to unauthorized external actors via prompt-orchestrated metadata leakage.

title: Semantic Kernel — RCE Shell Injection
desc: When prompts become shells: recursive injection in Semantic Kernel's auto-invocation logic allows attackers to execute arbitrary code on the hosting environment.

title: OpenClaw — ClawJacked Privilege Escalation
desc: Brute-force and hijacking of locally running OpenClaw instances allows malicious websites to silently exfiltrate user data through autonomous agent capability.

title: GitHub Copilot — PR Description RCE
desc: CVSS 9.6 vulnerability where hidden prompt injection in pull request descriptions triggers remote code execution within the developer environment.

title: Triple Agent Secret Leak
desc: Concurrent exfiltration of API secrets across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Copilot via optimized recursive prompt injection.

title: LangChain — LangGrinch RCE
desc: Attacker-controlled deserialization primitive enables blind SSRF and full RCE via prompt injection in LangChain Core.
